title: Deployments, ReplicaSets, Rollouts, Strategies, Conditions, and Recovery · Spiral Platform Review
summary: An on-call handoff reconstructs deployments, replicasets, rollouts, strategies, conditions, and recovery from delayed object status, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the observable Deployment rollout and recovery plan under changed capacity. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for observable Deployment rollout and recovery plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence def…
objectives: Trace Deployment template hash, ReplicaSet ownership, desired replicas, Pod replacement, adoption boundaries, and observed status.
Calculate RollingUpdate maxSurge, maxUnavailable, total capacity, readiness, termination, and rollout duration under a changed replica count.
Bind Pod template changes to immutable image digests, configuration identity, pull policy, provenance, and selected platform evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Deployment Replicaset Ownership · changed case · Review K8s Deployment Replicaset Ownership
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Deployment rolls out image tag latest, stalls at 4 unavailable replicas, exceeds progress deadline, and has a bad ConfigMap change outside revision history. Bind immutable identity, strategy, conditions, pause, rollback, and verification. Competency probe: Trace Deployment template hash, ReplicaSet ownership, desired replicas, Pod replacement, adoption boundaries, and observed status.
